headline: Garrett struggled with command, issued multiple hard-hit balls.
key_finding: A barrel rate allowed of 7% is well above the league average of 7.8%, indicating poor pitch location when behind in counts. Whiff rate of 31% suggests hitters were comfortable laying off breaking balls.
concern_flag: High barrel rate in back-to-back starts warrants mechanical review.

headline: Devon was untouchable — elite swing-and-miss stuff all night.
key_finding: Devon generated a 37% whiff rate, well above the league average of 25.4%. Velocity held steady above 94 mph through the 7th inning with no signs of fatigue. Particularly dominant pitching to the outer third against right-handed hitters.
pitch_mix_note: Fastball-heavy mix (est. ~52%) with curveball as primary off-speed.

headline: Liam battled but relied on defense for a solid outing.
key_finding: Velocity was down 1.9 mph from the 30-day baseline, though command compensated with a 53% zone rate. xwOBA allowed of 0.297 is near league average — no dominant pitch stood out today.
concern_flag: Velocity dip worth monitoring over the next two starts.

headline: Marcus was sharp, controlling both sides of the plate effectively.
key_finding: A 32% CSW rate reflects consistent zone presence combined with above-average chase rates. Marcus's pitch mix diversity (entropy: 0.90) kept hitters off-balance, contributing to soft contact when they did make contact.
pitch_mix_note: Fastball-heavy mix (est. ~59%) with slider as primary off-speed.

pitch_mix_note: Fastball-heavy mix (est. ~49%) with changeup as primary off-speed.
